scope: Cycle 23: Recover C22 ghost code + wire BiomeRadial + faction dashboard + 3 bug fixes

bugs_found.description: Dashboard reads meta.factions instead of meta.faction_rep — all faction bars show 0
Maturity calc reads meta.oghams.owned but oghams are at state.oghams.skills_unlocked — oghams count always 0
_update_dashboard() takes 0 args but reputation_changed emits 3 (faction, value, delta) — runtime crash
bugs_found.fix: Added default parameters: _update_dashboard(_faction: String = '', _value: float = 0.0, _delta: float = 0.0)

overall_assessment: C22 was ghost code — status claimed done but changes were uncommitted. Recovered and fixed 3 bugs in the ghost code: wrong dict keys for faction rep and oghams, signal argument mismatch. 30 total bugs fixed across 23 cycles.
